title: Zed Workspace Dock Marker
description: Marker file stored as .zed-dock.json inside a managed symlink dock.

version.description: Marker format version supported by this binary.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path of the workspace file that owns this dock.

links.description: Symlink entries managed by this dock.

name.description: Single filesystem entry name inside the dock.

target.description: Absolute path targeted by the dock symlink.
